stepsCompleted.docNote: Fixed deploy-backend.yml: removed type:pkg.type from deploy package.json generation — Node.js was seeing type:module with CJS esbuild output causing all functions to fail loading. No schema or API changes.

Integrated @branded/schemas into frontend: apiClient.ts now supports optional Zod schema validation param, demoAuthContext validates login responses with DemoLoginResponseSchema, page.tsx uses HelloResponseSchema. Added apiClient + DemoLoginForm unit tests (14 passing) and authenticated-hello E2E spec (4 tests). Added jest.config.ts with next/jest and @branded/schemas module mapping.

Fixed deploy-backend.yml: removed type:pkg.type from deploy package.json generation — Node.js was seeing type:module with CJS esbuild output causing all functions to fail loading. No schema or API changes.

Also removed unused TextareaHTMLAttributes import. Net: -56 lines. All 14 frontend tests + 20 backend tests pass. No other dead code found in backend, frontend, or e2e directories.
